title: Get your Oklahoma Adjuster and Producer CE Credits with CEU!
body:
Get your Oklahoma Adjuster and Producer CE Credits with CEU!

Take the headache out of meeting your Oklahoma Insurance CE requirements with CEU!

Earn CE as you meet Oklahoma’s Legislative Update and Earthquake requirements and sharpen your knowledge on important topics in Oklahoma - with NO state reporting fees and NO hidden fees:

  • Oklahoma Legislative Updates
  • Earthquakes and Insurance
  • Natural Disasters
  • Ramp up on Coverage for Recreational Type Vehicles

Find Your CEU Courses Today:

Save Money and Time with CEU Unlimited.

Meet all your CE requirements, including Oklahoma’s Legislative Update and Earthquake requirements, with unlimited access to our full library of on-demand CE courses and webinars.

CEU’s library of 150+ insurance CE courses and webinars are approved for all 50 states, District of Columbia, and Puerto Rico. By selecting the CEU Unlimited you will gain:

  • Unlimited access for 12 months to 150+ approved on-demand courses and live webinars
  • NO state reporting, hidden, or surprise fees
  • Learn anytime, anywhere: start on your laptop and finish on your phone with our web app
  • Unlimited exam retakes for on-demand courses
  • CE credits reported within two business days
